messages.content: Thanks! My neighbors were interested in trying yoga, so I hosted a class for them on Friday. It was great to see everyone embrace and enjoy it. Here is our photo together.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That's cool! What made you want to start teaching it?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I find it calming and wanted to share that with others. Giving people peace and awareness brings me so much happiness.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, Deb! It's awesome when we can share something we love and make things better for others.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Teaching it is awesome because it can help others and I've made such great friends through it. It's really nice for building community connections.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That's really motivating. It's great to have support in tough times.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's one of life's best parts, right?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, having someone to rely on is key in tough times. It really makes a difference in how we handle life. Plus, there's something I wanted to tell you.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What's up? I'm listening. We'll figure it out.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm having a hard time dealing with my Engineering assignments. It's a lot to manage and I'm struggling to keep up. Can we still talk about time management?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Sure, Jolene. Let's find a time that works for both of us.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Let's find a time to chat - I'll check my schedule and get back to you.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Take your time, Jolene. We'll work it out. Take care of yourself, OK?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'll make sure to take it. See you soon!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'm here for you if you need me. Let's catch up soon.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Have a great day!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene, it's been a while. Hope you're doing okay with all your exams and deadlines. I know it's difficult for you right now.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deb! Yeah, it can be tough. Trying to find time for everything is like playing catch-up - really stressful!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: How do you manage your time and stay organized with all the projects and deadlines?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm using the Pomodoro Technique - 25 minutes work, 5-minute break - to avoid burnout but I'm still struggling to prioritize. Do you have any other tips on time management?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I create a daily schedule or to-do list. Here's my example for today.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I tried making one but it's kinda overwhelming when it's a big stack of tasks. Here's an example from last Friday.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Have you tried breaking it down or prioritizing the tasks?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It can often feel overwhelming and difficult to figure out where to start.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I get it, Jolene. When I'm overloaded, I use a certain method. It helps me figure out what's important and urgent so I'm more organized. Do you know about it?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Nah, I'm not familiar with that one. What's it about?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Want me to tell you about it? It helps you organize things based on how important and urgent they are.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sure, tell me more about it! It sounds useful.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: The Eisenhower Matrix sorts tasks into four boxes, categorizing them based on their urgency and importance. It can be really useful for organizing and prioritizing. Here's a breakdown.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: The visualization is helpful too. Thanks for sharing!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I am glad, it was helpful. Let's give it a try and see if it helps you stay focused and less stressed.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, I'll give it a go. Fingers crossed it'll help me. Thanks for the help!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Don't forget to take it easy and look after yourself. Wishing you all the best! Recently, Anna and I were sitting by the sea, watching the sunset and talking about each other. And we realized that we inspire each other. What thoughts does the sea in this photo make you think of?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: This gets me thinking of when I'll learn to surf. Gotta find that spare time!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Surfing, huh Jolene? Chase your dreams, don't be daunted. Have you thought about the steps you can take?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Definitely! I've been gathering information, watching videos, and I even got a beginners' guide to surfing. Just need to find the right time and place to get a lesson.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Way to go! Taking those first steps is key. Believe in yourself and keep going!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks for the support! Those got me pumped to try surfing. Gonna keep pushing myself to make it happen.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Keep it up, Jolene! Remember, the experience matters just as much as the end result. Step by step and have fun along the way. You can do it!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks for the boost!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deb, long time no talk. A lot's happened! On Friday I had a breakthrough with my engineering project. Finally found a solution to a prob that's been bugging me. Feels great to see my hard work paying off.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: You've really proven your skills. Feels great, right? Keep it up! And I bought new props for the yoga class! Here it is in action.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Oh, I also have new details for this case! Rate it!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That`s cool! I also bought this candle for the atmosphere and to improve my yoga practice. How about you? When you do it, what feelings do you get?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I feel relaxed during this activity. I love creating a serene space with soothing scents like lavender and rosemary. Do you have any favorite scents or rituals for when you do it?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'm also a big fan of scents like this! Candles and essential oils add warmth and calm to my yoga session. It's amazing how certain smells can transport you to a place of peace.  Do you have any other ways to enhance your yoga practice?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I find music helps me. Any favorite tracks?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I find instrumental tracks with mellow melodies and rhythms help create a peaceful vibe. One of my favorites is a track called "Savana." What songs/artists do you like listening to during your practice?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I love listening to Nils Frahm and Olafur Arnalds during my practice. Their music is so calming and puts me in a different headspace. Do you have any recommendations for other similar artists or tracks I should check out?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Also, I'm listening to an album called 'Sleep,' which is great for meditation and deep relaxation. Hope you find it as calming as I do!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks for the tips, Deborah! I'm gonna check them out. It's always good to have some new tunes for yoga!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Let me know your thoughts on the albums!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: See you!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Take care and keep up the good work!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! Great to see you! Had a blast biking nearby with my neighbor last week - was so freeing and beautiful. Checked out an art show with a friend today - really cool and inspiring stuff. Reminded me of my mom.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deborah! Sounds like you had a blast biking and at the art show. Your photo looks like you were really into it! Did it make you think profound thoughts?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: My mom was interested in art. She believed art could give out strong emotions and uniquely connect us. When I go to an art show, it's like we're still experiencing it together even though she's gone. It's hard but comforting.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Losing someone is hard, but finding something that helps you cope is great.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Finding ways to keep her memory alive gives me peace. It's amazing how something simple like artwork can bring back powerful emotions and remind us of those we've lost. It's about finding solace in the things we love, and art has done that for me.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Even though my snakes can't chat or understand what I'm going through, our time together is valuable and teaches me to take time and be in tune with myself. Similarly, playing video games with my partner after a long day is a great way for me to relax.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Simple things can indeed bring us the most happiness. How have these activities helped you during tough times?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It brings us closer together!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: This kind of comfort can be really helpful when times get tough.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Just so you know, I've been working on a big project lately - it's been tough but also really cool to watch it take shape. Can't wait to see the final result!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I am waiting to hear how everything turns out. Keep up the good work!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep you updated on the progress of the project.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Glad my support means a lot to you! I'll always be here for you.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Take care!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Enjoy your day and make time for the things that bring you joy. See ya!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'll make sure to find time for that. Have a good one!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deborah! Long time no talk - I had lots of stuff going on. Remember the tough engineering project? I finally wrapped that up last month. Look at the result!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Jolene! Congrats on wrapping up your with it! You really put in the work and it paid off.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm really proud of myself for sticking it out despite the problems and finishing it. It's definitely a big milestone.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Now that you've reached this big milestone, what do you have planned next?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm interning at a well-known engineering firm. It's been a great opportunity to test my skills and gain real-world experience. These are my new colleagues!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What's been the best part of it so far?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: The best part so far has been being able to apply what I learned in school to real projects. It's so fulfilling to see my ideas come to life.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Mind if I ask how the internship has impacted you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It has had a positive impact on my life. It has stoked my love of engineering and has encouraged me to keep striving for my dreams.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: How has it inspired you to keep striving for your dreams?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hanging out with people who love what they do has really inspired me to stay focused and keep working towards my goals. It's shown me that with dedication and effort, anything is possible.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Have you been able to find a good work-life balance during your internship?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Honestly, finding that balance has been tough. I've been slogging away and it's been hard to make time for my hobbies and chilling out.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Have you considered taking some breaks and finding activities like yoga to help you relax and unwind? That might make a difference.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, I`m trying to do it. Here's an example of how I spent yesterday morning, yoga on top of mount Talkeetna.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Nice job, Jolene! How long have you been doing yoga and meditation? It looks like it's really helping you regroup and recharge.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I've been doing them sporadically for about 3 years now and they've had a real positive effect on me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Has it benefited you in any way? Have you found it helpful in difficult moments?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It has helped me with stress and kept me centered.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Glad they've been helpful for you!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: No idea how I would've survived without them!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: This is my favorite studio and it's always so calming.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I was wondering if you have any advice on calming the mind and breathing during yoga?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'd recommend practicing mindful breathing for yoga. Set aside a few minutes each day to sit with your eyes closed, take deep breaths, and focus on how the air feels entering and leaving your body.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deborah! I'll definitely give it a try. Appreciate the advice!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: If you need more tips or help, just let me know. Take care!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: See you!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! How's it going? We haven't talked in a while. I've been busy getting ready for a yoga retreat with some buddies. A chance to hang out with people who think like me and find peace and understanding. Sounds awesome!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deb! Been super hectic with internship and stuff. That retreat sounds awesome, I could definitely use a break!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: By the way, I tried a new pose - Dancer Pose (Natarajasana). Rate, did I succeed?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: You are amazing as always! Here are new photos of Seraphim in the new aquarium that I bought the day before yesterday.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Where'd you get it? I'm always drawn to animals, they bring so much joy. What's its story?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I got her last year, she's a great pet. She always cheers me up and brings a sense of peace. Spending time with her is so comforting.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Pets really do make life more enjoyable and bright.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm so thankful it's here. Plus, it's nice to have a calm creature around.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: How have things been besides that?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Things have been intense lately. I'm really pushing myself to succeed, and sometimes it feels overwhelming. But I'm determined to overcome any obstacles and achieve my goals.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Keep up the hard work and remember to relax too.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deborah! I had a big breakthrough with this project - so exciting and rewarding!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Awesome, Jolene! I'm really glad your project worked out.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Stop talking about me, tell me more about your retreat.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'd rather show you a photo. This is also a new yoga pose that we tried. It is a tree pose.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: What's that statue in the picture?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's a symbol of peace and enlightenment.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, it looks gorgeous! I'd love to visit a retreat like that. It seems like the ideal spot to find peace and refreshment.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's perfect for reflecting and getting centered.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I could really use some chill time like that. Sounds so peaceful.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yeah, we all need some peaceful time to relax.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Gotta run, have a nice day!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: See you!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! I started a running group with Anna - it's awesome connecting with people who care about fitness!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Cool, Deb! Glad you found some people to get fit with. I'm trying to add workouts into my studying schedule, which has been tough but fun. How about you? Any challenges with the running group?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Oh, I'm having a blast with it! We help and push each other during our runs, which makes it so much easier to stay motivated.  I have a lot of my photos from this activity.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Deborah, that's awesome! Being part of a supportive group must be super motivating. Finding a team that's passionate about something makes a huge difference. Just thinking about my own journey too.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Having people who can cheer you on and give you advice really makes a difference. What has it been like for you finding supportive folks?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Gaming's been tough lately, but I'm grateful I have someone who's also into it. My partner helps me stay focused on our goals. We have a lot of cute photos, I want to share with you.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What do you like best about gaming together?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: We get to tackle challenges and have a shared experience. It's always a blast when we're into the same game and achieve something tough. Plus, it's a great way to bond and get closer.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Woah, that's cool! Gaming is so good for strengthening relationships. Do you two have a favorite game to play together?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, we love playing "It takes two" together! It's a fun team-strategy game and it's competitive. Plus, it's a great way for us to bond. Do you have any activities you like doing with people?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yep, I do running and yoga/meditation with others. Connecting with people and creating a community is great. Plus, I love organizing workshops and events to practice mindfulness and self-care. It's an awesome way to have fun, build relationships, and support each other's growth.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sounds like a great way to relax. What do your workshops and events involve?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It involves various activities such as yoga, meditation, and self-reflection. They aim to cultivate self-awareness, promote mental and emotional well-being, and help individuals find inner peace. It's a space where people can connect, explore, and grow.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Your events are awesome for helping people connect and learn, it is so important. How has everything been going for you?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Thanks, Jolene! It's been great seeing everyone come together and support each other. It's amazing to witness the growth and transformation that happens through these workshops. I'm honored to be a part of it.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, Deb! I can imagine how rewarding it must be to create a space for growth and change. It's great to hear that everything's going well. You can always count on me for support! I just want to share a photo with you.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Thanks, Jolene! Your support means a lot to me. I'm here for you too. By the way, I noticed your pet in the picture. What made you decide to get a snake?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I was fascinated by reptiles, and it felt like the perfect pet for me. Taking care of it has been really calming, and it's a great way to connect with nature.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Glad you found something that gives you peace and calm. Do you have a favorite memory with "it" to share?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I have lots of great memories, like our little 'snake adventure'. She got out and I spent hours searching, so relieved when I finally found her snuggling under the bed. It really showed how much I love her.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What was it like when you found her? I can imagine the relief!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Seeing her snuggled under the bed made me feel so much love and gratitude. It made me realize how important she is to me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: They bring so much joy and remind us of what's important.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Animals teach us a lot about love and gratitude, and they bring so much joy.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I haven't introduced you to my pets yet! I don't like dogs, that's why I have cats.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Looks like they're having a blast! How often do you take them out?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Exercise and nature are really important to me, so I make sure to take them out for a run in the park every morning and evening.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow Deb, that's great! I'd love to experience that every day.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Nature helps me find peace every day - it's so refreshing!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It's a pity that my snakes don't run!  I'd love to do that more often. They would motivate me and together it would be more fun.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's like hitting a reset button that helps me put things into perspective and gives me time to reflect.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, I totally get it. Whenever I can, I love going for walks to take it all in. And I take photos like this

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's amazing how nature has the power to bring us peace and clarity.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: This photo captures the peacefulness of a lake surrounded by trees.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Why did you choose that spot? It looks so calm.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It's such a hidden gem! It makes me feel so peaceful and tranquil.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Lucky you for having somewhere to relax and tune out!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: We'll definitely go there together sometime!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: We all need a timeout!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! Great news - I just started a project for a cleanup in our community and have been trying to raise funds for it. It's been amazing to see everyone come together to make a difference. How've you been? Anything new going on?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Debs! Congrats on your project for the community! As for me, life's been a rollercoaster lately. Last week, I had a huge setback with my project. I put in so much work and it all crashed and I lost everything. SO frustrating and depressing.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Jolene, sorry to hear that. It must be really tough. I'm here for you and if I can do anything, just let me know. Is there anything that's helping you cope?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Your support means a lot. Susie really helps when times get tough. Pets have been great company. Video games have also been a nice distraction.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: They can really provide love and comfort, especially during tough times. How did you come to have Susie?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I adopted her two years ago when I was feeling lonely and wanted some company.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That's great, Jolene! Animals sure have a way of bringing us happiness. They understand us and provide us with comfort. Plus, having a pet teaches us responsibility. She came at the perfect time - cherish those moments with her and find strength in her presence.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks Deborah. Having her around shows me I can stay strong and find joy in the small stuff.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Enjoying the little things is key. Those little moments can give us a boost and push us forward. How have you been taking care of yourself lately?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm trying to prioritize self-care, like yoga and meditation. It helps me stay balanced and grounded.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: If you're interested, I can suggest some routines for you to try.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm always on the lookout for new routines to mix things up.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: In the meantime, check out this great place for yoga.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: This room looks perfect for it. Do you have any favorite routines you can share?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: One of my favorite yoga routines is a gentle flow that's all about breathing and grounding. It helps me find my chill. I'll send you a tutorial video with the poses. This is me in the process :)

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow! Does that help you find your chill or improve your concentration?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's a great way to find balance in tough times. Try it out and let me know what you think!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Can't wait to try it out. Let's chat soon!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Let me know how it goes. Talk to you later!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yep, I'll practice and update you. Bye!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Since we last spoke, I made a meditation guide for my yoga retreat. How about you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I have been stressed since I lost my work files. I was so overwhelmed...but meditation kept me chill and I got my clarity back, thank goodness. Really appreciate the practice!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's amazing how it can give you peace and calm in times like that. If you ever need any support, just let me know - we're in this together!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Appreciate your support! BTW, I wanted to share this with you.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Your creativity is amazing!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb! I was inspired by my love for space and engines, so I designed these notebooks with elements like galaxies and circuitry. I think they turned out really cool!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: You have such a knack for turning these into art. They make me feel excited just by looking at them. Your creativity is amazing! Does that usually inspire your engineering projects too?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Seeing art and design in various things gives me a unique perspective on problems.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Got any neat projects or ideas you're pumped about?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Working on a cool project now - a prototype that could revolutionize aerial surveillance. Can't wait to see the results!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I admire your ambition to make a difference. Do you have any specific plans or goals for this project?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: My aim is to devise a more productive and affordable aerial surveillance system. It'll help with responding to emergencies and monitoring the environment. It'll make the world a better, safer place.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I love your commitment. Keep going!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot. I'll keep pushing and doing my best to make a difference.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: You got this!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Been thinking a lot about my plans lately, especially after checking in with my bf. It's been up and down!  Some days it feels like I'm trying to juggle my engineering, relationship, and growing as a person, and I just don't know how to handle it all. How do you manage when it's too much?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Finding ways to restore balance is important. Taking time for yourself and recognizing your needs can make a difference.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb! I've been trying out some time management strategies recently and started using a bullet journal. It's been really helpful for tracking my tasks and staying organized.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's great to hear that it's been helping you out!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Not only does it help me stay on top of everything, but it's also so satisfying when I cross tasks off my list. Here's a pic of my newest spread with one of my favorite quotes.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I love this quote. So uplifting. Does it motivate you when you see it?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, it's like a little reminder to stick to my goals and never give up.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Gotcha! Visual reminders like this photo can be super motivating. Keep focusing on your goals, Jolene, and don't give up! I led a meditation yoga sessionto the elderly at a local care home last week during sunset. Nature can be really helpful for finding peace. Have you tried mindfulness too?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Haven't tried it yet, but I'm keen to give it a shot. That sounds really peaceful. I could use some of that calm in my life right now.  I'm interested in destressing and trying mindfulness.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I started with workshops and books, and now mindfulness is a huge part of my life.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'll definitely look into some of it. Can't wait to get started!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That's great, Jolene! I'm so glad you're willing to try some mindfulness. It can be really helpful. Let me know if you need any help getting started - I'm happy to assist you with your journey!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I really appreciate it.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: We're in this together. Give me a shout if you need anything. Bye for now.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, I'll hit you up if I need anything. Bye for now.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! Hope you're having a good one. Last Friday I told Anna the story of my life and they were super kind about it. It was so nice to have a meaningful connection. How's the mindfulness workshops and reading going? Need any help?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Life's been hella busy since we last talked. I bought a console for my partner as a gift on the 17th and it's so much fun, he even managed to play it.! Engineering studies are still going strong too. Balance has been key for me lately. How about you? What's been up?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Well done! As for me, I've been focusing on teaching yoga and spending time with the community. Organizing a yoga event last month was really cool.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Was it rewarding seeing everyone come together? Can you tell me more about how you put it together? Also, any tips for maintaining a balance between hobbies and studies?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I reached out to different nearby businesses and places to make it happen. We had yoga, food stalls, and even some live music - it was amazing! As for balancing hobbies and studies, I find it helpful to prioritize and manage my time effectively. Making a schedule and setting aside specific time for studying and pursuing hobbies can go a long way in maintaining balance.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, that's awesome! Gonna make a plan to manage my studies and hobbies. Say, do you ever play video games?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I used to play some video games, but it's been a while. It's a good way to relax after a busy day. Do you have any game suggestions? What's your favorite game?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I have a few game recommendations. Zelda BOTW for Switch is an awesome open-world game. Animal Crossing: New Horizons is really calming and cute. As for my favorite game, it's hard to choose just one!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Cool recs! I'll definitely check those out. What about your favorite memories of playing video games?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Oh, I forgot to mention Overcooked 2 - this is a good co-op game if you're into hilarious and chaotic cooking. My partner and I often play for bets! I once won three large pizzas!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Reminds me of when I used to play games with my husband. We'd take turns and it was a great way to bond and make memories. Gaming really can bring people closer, right?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, you`re right! What's your favorite game to play with that person?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: We prefer to play detective games together.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: What other activities do you both enjoy doing together?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: We also enjoyed spending time outdoors and exploring nature. It was always so refreshing to be outside and soak up the fresh air.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm a big fan of being outside too! It's so calming and refreshing. Do you have any special spots you like to go to?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I love going to this park near my house - it has a nice forest trail and a beach. It's a peaceful spot where I can do some yoga and reflect. There's also a special bench that holds special meaning to me.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sounds lovely! Nature can be calming. What makes this bench special to you?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It holds a lot of special memories for me and my mom - we would come here and chat about dreams and life. It's full of good moments.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That's awesome, Deborah! What were some of your favorite memories with your mom at this spot? It looks super peaceful and pretty.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'll always cherish my memories with her at this spot. I remember a beautiful sunset we watched together in silence - the colors in the sky were so special. Every time I go back, I feel so much peace and gratitude for the time I spent with her.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Places and moments like that can mean so much, and it's a gift to find peace and gratitude in them.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'm really thankful for all the time we had.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It's so important to cherish it.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Long time no talk! We were given a new game for the console last week, it is Battlefield 1. What's been up with you?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! Good to hear from you. That`s cool! Been thinking about a few big moments lately - went to a place that held a lot of memories for me. Sat on a bench where we used to chat and it brought back a lot of emotions.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Mostly happy or a bit of everything?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It was quite a mix, Jolene. I felt nostalgia and longing, but also grateful for the memories. It's amazing how a place can mean so much. I brought these flowers there.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Do you think she would like it?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yeah, my mom really loved flowers. They always made her so happy. She appreciated the simple things in life.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, that's a great photo! How did she show you to appreciate it?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: By taking it slow, seeing beauty in them, and finding joy.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow Deb, that's awesome! We should definitely take time to enjoy that and not let the business of life cause us to miss out on the good stuff.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yeah, Jolene. Life can be so busy that we often overlook the small things that truly matter. Let's make an effort to appreciate them more.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yep Deb, slowing down and enjoying simple moments can bring a lot of balance and happiness. I'm trying to do more yoga and meditation myself to help relax and stay focused. Are there any calming habits that you practice to feel balanced?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yeah, same here, Jolene! Yoga and meditation help me find balance and inner peace. Going out for walks and staying mindful also keep me grounded. I take similar photos on walks.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Gorgeous! Going for a walk and feeling so peaceful must be amazing.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Moments like that I'll always cherish.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That calm and peaceful feeling is so nice - it's great for recharging and thinking.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's like a reboot for me.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Got it! It's like hitting the refresh button and coming back even better.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What's your favorite yoga pose for some rest?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm a fan of savasana - aka the corpse pose. It's so calming and helps me just let go and surrender.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Funny photo! How long have you been doing yoga?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Been doing it for 3 years. It's a great way to escape studying and work stress.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, Jolene! Taking time to unwind is key and that seems just right for you!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm really finding my zen again!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Keep it up!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks for your support, Deb!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Good luck with everything. Stay in touch.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene! Good to hear from you! A lot's happened since we talked - last week I got to go to this yoga retreat near my mom's place. It was so cool - I got to hang with nature and really get to know myself. Definitely life-changing! That's how beautiful it was there!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, Deb, sounds great! Glad you got to connect with yourself and nature. That's my own way to relax. What are your thoughts on life now?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Life's been super meaningful lately. Nature and self-reflection have helped me see how beautiful every moment is. We can really grow and learn when we listen to ourselves. What's been up with you lately? Any insights or experiences?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Life's been hectic, but I'm making strides toward my goals. It's tough, but satisfying.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Can you tell me a bit more about it and what you've achieved?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: My goal is to be successful in my field and make a positive impact. I've been studying, attending workshops, and networking to make it happen. Recently, I had the opportunity to present at a virtual conference and received positive feedback.  It was a great experience and confirmed that I'm on the right track.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: You really put your heart and soul into it. Must have been amazing having it go so well. How did it feel when people gave you positive feedback? Any ideas for what comes next?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I was thrilled to receive such positive feedback! It felt so rewarding to know that my efforts were appreciated. Right now, I'm focusing on studying and gaining more experience. I'm even thinking about more internships to further enhance my skills. Exciting times! Hopefully, there will be more updates to share with you soon.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, Jolene! Way to go! I'm super proud of all you've achieved. Let me know if you need any help. Onward!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb! Your support means a lot to me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: No problem. You got this!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm not giving up, just gonna keep pushing forward.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Reach for your goals and don't forget to enjoy the journey.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb. Your support means a lot. I'll keep pushing forward and remember to enjoy every step of the way.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Come on! The journey's as important as the destination. Take time for yourself and find joy in it. We believe in you!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, you're right! I'll take your advice and find joy on the way. Cheers for the support!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Always by your side!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene, since we talked I've been thinking about my mom's influence. Remembering those we love is important.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I understand, Deb. Remembering and cherishing the memories of our loved ones is so important. It's comforting to know that their influence still guides us. Last Friday, my partner and I talked about how our loved ones have influenced us and what their values meant to us. It was an emotional chat, but it made us feel closer and showed us what really matters.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Those types of conversations really help build relationships. Can you tell me more about the values they have given you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Definitely! Our loved ones have taught us to persevere and stay resilient, like my mom always said to never give up, and my partner's dad showed them to stay determined. Their values have influenced us to pursue our goals, such as me with engineering and my partner with their creative endeavors. Even though they're not here, we both feel their values encouraging us along our paths.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That's wonderful to hear, Jolene! It's amazing how their values continue to guide you, even in their absence. It sounds like you and your partner are honoring their memory by pursuing your respective passions. Have you ever considered incorporating those values into your work as well?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, Deborah! We've been figuring out how to add these values into our projects. As an engineering student, I want to use my talents to do good and help solve important problems. I'm keen on coming up with new ideas and making things more efficient to make the world a better place. Going further, my mom stressed the value of helping others and that's something I want to keep in mind for my engineering projects.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: When our work ties into our values, it becomes more meaningful. What goals or ideas do you have for incorporating those values into your future projects?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: In the future, I'm aiming to work on projects that make a real difference to communities. I'm interested in sustainable initiatives and developing innovative solutions for environmental issues. I also want to get involved with organizations that focus on social causes, using my skills to help out. It's about connecting my passion for engineering with my commitment to making a positive impact.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: You've got a lot of amazing plans for the future. Which projects are you most interested in getting involved in?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm keen on two projects in particular. One is focused on developing renewable energy, like solar, to help communities and reduce dependence on non-renewables.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow Jolene, that's really inspiring!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: The other is finding ways to supply clean water to those with limited access. Both align with my beliefs about sustainability and assisting those in need. I still have so much to figure out before beginning, but I'm up for the challenge.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Sounds great, Jolene! Research is key to success. Little steps and being up for challenges make you stronger. I'm here for you. Connecting to yourself helps tackle any issue. Here's a photo that reminds me of the beauty of nature during a yoga session.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It helps with challenges, giving balance and strength. Any tips for staying relaxed while studying?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Taking breaks, doing some stretching/yoga, or just going for a walk is really helpful. And don't forget to get enough sleep and take time for self-care. Finding a balance between work and taking care of yourself is important. What self-care activities have you been doing lately?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I've been into yoga and meditation lately. It helps me recharge. Doing different poses relieves tension and calms my mind. I've already shared my newfound love for yoga with my partner, and we're planning to go on a meditation retreat together to enhance our practice together.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Glad to hear that yoga is helping you rest and recharge. It's great for reflection and self-care. Do your snakes also enjoy it?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: My snakes just like watching me chill. But she's a great company and always brings a sense of calm.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Having a pet around is such a calming feeling. They sure can bring a great sense of comfort. I still have cats, Luna is sitting on the left.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Aww, that's adorable! What's the second one's name?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Max! They bring lots of joy and peace to our home.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: How did you get them?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Max is my mother's cat, I took him when my mother passed away.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: You're great for taming him. How did you get Luna?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I took Luna from the shelter.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It’s wonderful that you have become their loving owner!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yes, I really love cats, and they also need a home, love, and care! Moreover, Max is already old, he is 8 years old.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: How old is Luna?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: She is younger, she is 5 years old.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I am proud of your action to tame these pets!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deborah, how's it going? Guess what? Yesterday my partner and I got back from an awesome trip to Rio de Janeiro- we checked out some cool yoga classes.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That yoga pose looks great. Must've been a cool experience for the two of you. What did the trip teach you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: This country was awesome! It showed me different kinds of yoga and their backgrounds, which made me appreciate it even more. We visited a lot of delicious cafes! Have you ever been somewhere that was important to you?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yep, last month I visited my mom`s house which holds a special place in my heart. My mom had good and bad times there, but it's still a symbol of her strength and the love she shared with me. This is my husband in front of this house.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: What was it like?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It brought back fond memories as I relaxed outside.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sounds great! So glad you have a place to relax and find peace.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Thanks, Jolene. It's special for me. How about you? Is there a place that helps you relax?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I go to this nearby place to meditate by a tranquil spot.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Looks chill. What's been the effect of that?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It helps me make sense of everything and relieves stress. It's like a restart.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Cool, glad you found a place to chill. We all need that occasionally. This is one of my favorite spots to ponder and let things go.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Looks great! What made you pick that spot?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: The soothing vibes and nice views made it ideal for reflecting and letting go.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Here is one more photo from Rio de Janeiro. We went on many excursions there.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, those stairs look cool! Where were they taken?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: We had a great time visiting an old temple. The stairs were amazing!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, exploring those temples must have been incredible! Three years ago I was also in Rio de Janeiro, I took a beautiful photo on one of the excursions.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: The architecture and history of it all were really interesting. I'm sure you also liked the places you visited there!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Exploring historical places and learning their stories is so fun. It was a great experience. I want to share this photo with you.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: By the way, what did that paper have written on it in the photo?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: This was written to me by a friend who, unfortunately, will never be able to support me. I miss him here. This quote says"Let go of what no longer serves you."

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm sorry! That's a good reminder to stay focused and let go of what no longer serves us. Remember the quote in my notebook? It also inspires me!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What other quotes give you strength?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I came across this one while browsing and it really hit home with me. It's a great reminder to ditch the negative stuff and focus on growing and being positive.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Surrounding ourselves with good stuff and striving to improve is key.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yep, Deborah! It's about creating a good atmosphere to help us grow and improve. By the way, I have a new plant.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What made you pick it?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I got this as a reminder to nurture myself and embrace fresh starts.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Nice job, Jolene! Take care of yourself and embrace new beginnings.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks Deb! Will do. Good talking to you. Take care!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Have a great day!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene, just catching up. I went to a cool event last week with the aim to support each other - pretty inspiring. Have you been connecting with anyone lately?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deb, great to hear from you! I've been focusing on studying and my relationship with my partner. We're taking little trips to the beach, it's a great way to relax. How about you, anything new going on?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I was busy too - went to a community meetup last Friday. We shared stories and it was nice to feel how connected we are. It made me think about how important relationships are. How about you, how are things going in that area?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm really thankful for my significant other right now. It's great to have someone encouraging my goals! How are things with your friends and family? Any updates on that front?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Relationships with family and friends are so vital. My yoga pals have been my second family - we've held each other up through a lot. The other day I found this old photo. That was when I first started doing yoga. My mum was my biggest fan and source of motivation. She'd often come to my classes with me.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Our loved ones sure are supportive! When I was 10, my parents got me that and it was the start of my passion for video games.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Cool that they shared that with you. Did you learn on your own or did they teach you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I taught myself, but my dad was always supportive and my mom would play games with me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That's awesome! Sounds like you had a lot of support from your parents. What was your favorite game to play with mom?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: One of my favorites was "Monster Hunter: World". The immersive story and open-world gaming are amazing!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It can be so freeing when you get immersed in a game like that.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah! It's my way to de-stress and take a break from life.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What's up this month? Anything fun happening for you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Got a lot of finals coming up this month, so I've been studying real hard. It's been quite stressful, but it'll be worth it in the end. Thinking about taking a trip somewhere to relax and recharge afterward.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Good luck with it! Let me know if there's anything I can do to assist you.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Woohoo! I signed up for a meditation course at a retreat near a lake. Can't wait to share this experience with my partner and learn some new techniques. Sooo excited!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That`s awesome! It looks so calm in the pic - I hope you enjoy your experience and learn some new techniques!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It's amazing how something so easy can make such a big difference to our health!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Yep, it's become part of my routine now. Can't imagine my life without it.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, same! It helps me stay balanced during my studies.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Glad to hear it, Jolene. How's the project going?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It's tough but I'm chugging along. Thanks!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: You're so strong for handling all the challenges. You've got this!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb! Your support really means a lot. I'll keep pushing forward.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: No worries, Jolene. I'm here if you need me. Take care of yourself and don't forget to rest up.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: What have you been doing lately?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I recently saw this wonderful sunrise again.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Glimpsing that calms me. Taking beach walks relaxes me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Did my photo remind you of something?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That shot was like a reminder of my last beach getaway. So chill and nice.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Glad it brought back good memories.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Maybe one day we will be able to watch the sunrise together!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: An offer I can't refuse!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Bye, Deb! See you later!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: See ya! Stay safe and catch you later. Bye!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene, had a tough week. Storm forced us to cancel our yoga getaway.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sorry to hear about it. How are you feeling now?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I was bummed about it, but I'm doing better now. It was just a setback, but I found comfort in my work and spending time at home. Reminds me to be grateful for the little things. And you? How's it going?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: My partner and I plan a camping trip to connect with nature and practice yoga.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It can be both good and tough to plan activities with a busy schedule - what strategies do you use?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Having a routine helps me stay on top of everything I need to do. I have a schedule for classes, studying, and personal time. Self-care activities like yoga and meditation help me stay balanced and relax.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'd love to learn more about how you do it.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I can tell you about it if you're interested. It took a bit of experimenting, but it's really helped me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Sounds great! Let's set up a coffee date and talk about it!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wanna meet up at that cafe next Monday? Let's try fresh pastries.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Sounds good, Jolene! When did you have in mind? That cafe rocks.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: How about Wednesday at 4? Can't wait to catch up over coffee!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That pic looks so peaceful. Reminded me of a cool hidden coffee shop near me. Rate it!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Tell me more about it when we meet, maybe next time we’ll be there.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Sorry, I remembered that I already have plans for this day.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Now I'll see when it's more convenient for me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Thank you for your understanding, I'm waiting.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: How about Friday at 5? I will need to sort out the books from this bookcase and I will be free.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Absolutely, let's do that! Can't wait for our coffee date next week. See you then. Stay safe!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: See ya soon, Deb! Be safe and I'm excited for our coffee date!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Maybe just grab me some interesting books!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Hey Deb! So sorry for the late reply, been super busy. Last weekend my partner and I traveled to a meditation retreat for a few weeks in Phuket. Amazing experience! Nature, reflection and a break from engineering studies were awesome - it helped me find inner peace.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I'd love to hear more about your reflections there and how they changed you.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: At the retreat, I had time to reflect on what makes me happy. It made me realize the importance of incorporating relaxation, self-care, and balance in life alongside my engineering studies. The beauty of nature there was so inspiring and refreshing!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Was there anything from the retreat that stood out to you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: The one session that really stood out was about releasing expectations and judgments and just savoring the present. It was a strong reminder to not just dwell on the finish line, but to appreciate the journey too. I usually get too consumed with hitting my goals that I forget to appreciate the ride.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I've been thinking about this a lot, too. Life's full of small moments and being grateful for those can really boost our happiness.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yup, totally agree! Sometimes we get too focused on the big stuff and don't appreciate all the tiny wins. Like the feeling of the sun or a great cup of coffee - can be small but they make life much better. Trying to be more mindful and grateful to take it all in now.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That's great, Jolene! Practicing mindfulness and gratitude can really change our day-to-day. Even just a different outlook can make the little things in life joyful. Glad you're getting into it!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I'm experiencing a new level of joy and happiness!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's wonderful to see your progress, and I'm excited to be on this journey with you!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deb! Appreciate your support. It's great that we can do this together.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Having a supportive community definitely helps. We can motivate and encourage each other! By the way, I recently played a game. I don't remember what it's called. This is a card game about cats, where you take cards one by one from a deck, and then you can attack your opponent with them. We'll definitely play it with you!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I look forward to meeting you and playing this game!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Since speaking last, I reconnected with my mom's old friends. Their stories made me tear up and reminded me how lucky I am to have had her.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It's great that you could reconnect with them. Hearing stories about our loved ones can be tough but also comforting.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hearing stories about my mom was emotional. It was both happy and sad to hear things I hadn't heard before. It was a mix of emotions, but overall it was comforting to reconnect with her friends.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It can bring up a range of emotions, and it's okay to feel a mix of happiness and sadness. Those moments with her friends must've been meaningful to you.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, it was so special. A glimpse into her life beyond what I knew. Through their eyes, I appreciate her more. Here I am and my mom.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That looks like a blast! What did you and your mom's friends do on that day?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: We reminisced and looked through her photos. It was really sweet.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Looking at old photos must have been so nostalgic! It's great that you could share that experience with friends. It's amazing how photos and memories can give us a deeper appreciation for the people we love.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Pictures really have a way of bringing back memories and making us appreciate the special bond we have with our loved ones. They remind me of how strong love is and how amazing human relationships can be. Just like this one.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, what a gorgeous pic! Do you have any special memories of that beach or just love surfing in general?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That beach is super special to me. It's where I got married and discovered my love for surfing. It's always filled with joy and peace.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: What pleasant memories.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Here is another photo from my classes.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, that yoga pose looks amazing! Does it help you relax?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Oh yeah! Doing this on the beach is so peaceful - the ocean, sand, and fresh air create a super relaxing atmosphere. The perfect way to take care of myself.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I like to create my own serene yoga space with candles and oils for extra chill vibes. Also, we tried a new style of meditation in Thailand - with flowers.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Oh, same for me!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I find calm when I do yoga or meditate. I use essential oils and put on some soft, soothing music in the background to create a peaceful atmosphere. It really helps me chill out and center myself.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's amazing how our environment can enhance our practice.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah, totally! Our surroundings can really affect our mood and how much zen we can get from our routine. Creating a place that feels safe and chill is key.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, that looks so comfy and inviting! Where do you usually go to relax in your house?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: In my room, I usually go to relax and feel at ease. After a busy day, it's my little haven for peace and rest - the perfect spot to relax and recharge.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Sounds like your room does the job. That's awesome.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Here are my pals keeping me company.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey, that's Susie or Seraphim? How long has he been hanging out with you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It`s Susie! I've had her for two years now.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's awesome how pets can bring us comfort and peace when we need it.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Susie is a great companion.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: The love pets give is priceless.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Plus, they make life a lot brighter!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Hey Jolene, I'm so excited to tell you! Yesterday, me and my neighbor ran a free gardening class for the community, it was awesome! People of any age joined in and it was such a great thing to see.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, Deborah, that's awesome! Keep up the great work, and here's hoping for more events like this in the future!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Gardening is really amazing. It brings us together in such a cool way. It was awesome to share my love of plants and help people take care of the world. So, what about you? Anything new happened lately?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: We tried a scuba diving lesson last Friday and had an awesome time! We found a cool dive spot we can explore together. Trying new things opens up a world of adventure - maybe one day I'll be a certified diver. Anything fun going on with you?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: That sounds amazing, Jolene! I've been interested in underwater life, but I haven't had the chance to try scuba diving yet. Recently, I've been spending time remembering my mom. Last Sunday, I visited her old house and sat on a bench. It was a comforting experience, as if I could feel her presence guide me and remind me of her love.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Visiting your mom's old home sounds like it was really special. Is there something special you remember about her?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Thanks, Jolene! It was really special. My mom had a big passion for cooking. She would make amazing meals for us, each one full of love and warmth. I can still remember the smell of her special dish, it would fill the house and bring us all together.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Mmm, that looks delicious, Deb! So sweet how cooking with your mom brought everyone together. What's your best memory of cooking with her?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I loved it when she would bake pineapple birthday cakes for me when I was a kid. It always made me feel so special.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: No wonder it made you feel special.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Have you ever had something like that with someone close?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I used to bake cookies with someone close to me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: What's your favorite cookie to make?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: The warm, gooey chocolate and soft, buttery cookie are a match made in heaven.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I really want to eat this now.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Well look what I have here!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Is there anything special about it or the photo?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It takes me to another world when I read it!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Did I show you that I have a big bookshelf too?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I think not, I really like it!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Having a space like this is important for escaping reality and relaxing with a book. Do you have any books that really moved you?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: My bathroom has an aesthetic vibe. Once I read a self-discovery book there and it really resonated with me.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow! A special book that speaks to you and helps with self-discovery? That's awesome. Plus, having a cozy nook to chill? That's my best one!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sounds nice, Deb! A cozy nook is a must! The beach is a great place for finding peace and relaxation. Have you ever tried surfing?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Certainly! Here's the confirmation.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: How cool! But I never decided to try it.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's okay, maybe we can try it together sometime!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I already know what fate awaits me if I do this!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Have you ever been interested in this or do you know nothing about it?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Just started learning, but haven't gone yet. Want to come with me sometime?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It'll be an adventure! Let's make it happen soon!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: So glad, all that remains is to agree and choose the right time for both of us.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Can't wait. What day works for you? I'm really excited!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Let's plan for next month - I'll check my schedule and let you know. Can't wait!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: I had a great time at the music festival with my pals! The vibes were unreal and the music was magical. It was so freeing to dance and bop around. Music brings us together and helps us show our feelings. It reminds me of my mom and her soothing voice when she'd sing lullabies to me. Lucky to have those memories!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Wow, festivals sound so fun! Here's me and my partner at one last year - had an awesome time! It's my way of expressing myself and getting away from all the stress of everyday life. Just got back from a trip with my partner - so cool!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, what a gorgeous shot! It looks so tranquil and serene. You two look very happy together. Trips create awesome memories that we can share. Where did you go on your trip and what's something you'll never forget?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks! We had an awesome yoga retreat. The place was so peaceful and the view during yoga was amazing - the sunrise lit up the whole sky with bright colors. It was so beautiful, it made us feel so alive and grateful.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Wow, what a view!  How did it make you feel?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: It was amazing! Doing yoga with that backdrop made me feel connected to nature and myself. I felt incredibly peaceful and thankful.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Like, it's no wonder looking at such beauty can really help us refocus and connect with who we are. Have you ever experienced that?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: I remember taking a hike with my partner and coming across a waterfall oasis. Everything just felt so peaceful and my worries just disappeared. It was such a refreshing experience.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Are you planning to experience it again soon?

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Yeah! I'm planning to get out in nature again next month. It's going to be great reconnecting with it!

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: Enjoy it! This photo made me think of a gorgeous blossom tree from near my home. Every spring, it was magical to watch it bloom.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: That sounds magical! How was it watching the tree bloom each spring?

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It was like admiring nature's artwork. It filled me with awe and made me appreciate the beauty of life. Even in tough times, there's hope for growth.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: This photo I took is a great visual representation of that idea. It reminds me that I can keep growing through any obstacles.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It really captures resilience and strength. I love how you find inspiration in the small things.

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Thanks, Deborah! Appreciating those small things is important. It helps me remember that even when times are tough, there's always something positive to hang onto.

messages.speaker: Deborah
messages.content: It's a great habit. Thanks for reminding me!

messages.speaker: Jolene
messages.content: Sure Deb, it's great catching up. Keep on finding those beauties!

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Hey Evan, good to see you! What's new since we last met? Anything cool happening?

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Hey Sam! Good to see you! Yeah, I just got back from a trip with my family in my new Prius.

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Wow, not bad, what happened to the old one? Where'd you go, by the way?

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: My old prius broke down, decided to get it repaired and sell it. Glad you asked, we went to Rockies, check it out.

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Wow! Looks amazing. When did you get to go there?

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: We all hiked the trails last week - the views were amazing!

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Wow, that's cool. I love hiking, but it's been ages since I've done it. I did this hike with my dad way back when I was ten. Going hiking together was great fun, and really special for us.

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Aww, that's cute. How far did you two hike?

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: We hiked a good distance - quite a feat for me back then. It's definitely a great memory.

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: What other hobbies have you found for yourself?

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Nothing so far, but I was thinking about trying painting. Do you have any hobbies you love?

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Cool idea, Sam! I love it. Have you tried it before?

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Not yet, but I'm keen to give it a go. It looks like a nice way to chill and get creative.

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Yep, it's a great stress-buster. I started doing this a few years back.

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Wow, that's impressive! How did you get into watercolor painting?

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: My friend got me into it and gave me some advice, and I was hooked right away!

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Wow! I hope I can find something I'm as passionate about as you are with watercolor painting.

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: You'll find it, just keep trying new things until something sparks your excitement.

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Thanks, Evan! I'm excited to try new things, should be fun!

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: No worries, Sam! Super pumped for you! Let's catch up soon and see how you're enjoying your new hobbies!

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Yeah, I'll keep you posted. See you soon!

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Take it easy, Evan! Can't wait to see you. Have a good one!

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Hey Sam, good to hear from you! Since we last talked, lots has been happening! Last weekend, I took my family on a road trip to Jasper. It was amazing! We drove through the Icefields Parkway and the glaciers and lakes were gorgeous. I got a shot of a glacier, check it out!

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Hey Evan, looks amazing! I've never been to Jasper, but it looks breathtaking. Tell me more about your road trip. Was it relaxing?

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Hey Sam, thanks for asking! It was great - fresh air, peacefulness and a cozy cabin surrounded by mountains and forests made it feel like a real retreat.

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: That sounds great, Evan! It's so important to take time for ourselves and find peace, especially after a hard week. Mine's been tough.

messages.speaker: Evan
messages.content: Sorry to hear that, Sam. Is there anything I can do to help?

messages.speaker: Sam
messages.content: Thanks, Evan. Appreciate the offer, but had a check-up with my doctor a few days ago and, yikes, the weight wasn't great. It was pretty eye-opening.

messages.speaker: Evan
